message: NoMovesDetectionSystem implemented successfully. Subscribes to BoardStateChangedMessage, checks GamePhase.Playing, uses MoveEnumerator.HasAnyValidMove for short-circuit detection, publishes NoMovesDetectedMessage when no moves available.
Beginning P6.T3 system layer review - checking Core, Systems, tests, assembly definitions, naming conventions
Initial code review complete. No UnityEngine refs in Core/Systems. Assembly defs correct. Starting Unity compilation check.
No compilation errors. Running EditMode tests.

Identified all 10 failures. Root causes: 1) ScoringTable zero-init (3 test files), 2) Foundation validation allows all 4 foundations for aces (1 system + 2 hint tests), 3) UndoSystem flip test checks wrong card index (2 tests). Fixing now.
All 375 EditMode tests pass. Entering Play mode for runtime validation.

P6.T3 System Layer Review complete. All 375 EditMode tests pass. Zero compilation errors. Zero runtime errors. Issues found and fixed: (1) MoveEnumerator enumerated 4 foundation moves per ace instead of 1 - fixed to use canonical suit-based foundation index, (2) ScoringTable struct zero-init bug in 3 test SetUps - fixed with explicit values, (3) UndoSystem flip tests checked wrong card index (TopCard vs auto-flipped card) - fixed assertions to use direct card reference.
